description: LILA Lab Annotation Schema Registry — available domain schemas for XENI pipelines.

schemas.name: Economic Narrative Schema
schemas.description: Labels for economic relevance, topic (inflation/growth/trade/...), sentiment, and narrative frame.

schemas.name: Health Discourse Schema
schemas.description: Labels for health relevance, disease category, prevention/treatment framing, and source credibility.

schemas.name: Climate Narrative Schema
schemas.description: Labels for climate relevance, mitigation/adaptation framing, disaster type, and policy mention.

schemas.name: Education Policy Schema
schemas.description: Labels for education relevance, access/quality/policy framing, and level (primary/secondary/tertiary).

schemas.name: Political Discourse Schema
schemas.description: Labels for political relevance, ideology, event type, and actor classification.
